nginx conf part:
	sendfile			on;
	sendfile_max_chunk		64m;
	aio				off;
	read_ahead			128m;
	output_buffers			128 64k;
	directio			off;
	tcp_nopush			off;
	tcp_nodelay			on;
	send_lowat			1;
	keepalive_timeout		65 60;
	keepalive_requests		100;
	keepalive_disable		none;
	send_timeout			60s;
	reset_timedout_connection	on;
